products.resolution: hourly sea level; native product grid
products.role: ocean sea-level anomaly source for surface-mass loading
warnings: Verify whether tides, inverse-barometer response, and mean dynamic topography are represented before anomaly construction.
Do not add an ERA5-driven ocean response if it is already represented in this ocean product.
Freeze exact product/dataset versions, variable metadata, retrieval time, and checksums.

combining pre-corrected SG residuals with the same correction term again
